Kanji: お目に かかります
Kana: おめに かかります
Meaning (EN): meet (humble equivalent of あいます)

Kana: おちゃを たてます
ごらんに なります
Meaning (EN): see, look at (respectful equivalent of みます)
[a light] come on, be turned on
[a road] be made, be completed, come into existence
quit or retire from [a company], stop, give up
quit or retire from [a company], stop, give up
stand in a queue, line up
stand in a queue, line up
pass away (euphemistic expression for しにます(L.39))
pass away (euphemistic expression for しにます)
draw [a circle], mark [with a circle], add
be a substitute, be a replacement
take a rest, take a holiday
take a break, take a rest
ask, hear, visit (humble equivalent of ききます and いきます)
go, come (humble equivalent of いきます and きます)
eat, drink (respectful equivalent of たべます and のみます)
be in trouble, have a problem
be in trouble, have a problem
get to know (humble equivalent of しります)
leave (work or school) earlier than usual

Kana: じかんが たちます

Meaning (EN): write (かきます can also mean to draw or paint, but in this case it is written with hiragana in this book)

Kanji: 楽しみに して います
Kana: たのしみに して います
Meaning (EN): be looking forward to, be expecting
notice, become aware of [things left behind]
[boxes] be put in order, tidy up
put things in order, tidy up
say (one's name) is ～ (humble equivalent of いいます)
get tired (when expressing the condition of being tired, つかれました is used)
become tense, be strained, be nervous
tour, visit a place to study it

Kana: しんせつに します
めいわくを かけます

Meaning (EN): be in time [for an appointment, etc.]

Kanji: 降ろします、下ろします

Meaning (EN): receive (humble equivalent of もらいます)
eat, drink, receive (humble equivalent of たべます, のみます and もらいます)
be, go, come (respectful equivalent of います, いきます and きます)
say, (one's name) is ～ (respectful equivalent of いいます)

Kana: おなかが すきます
Meaning (EN): get hungry (when expressing the condition of being hungry, おなかが すきました is used)
take, cost (referring to time or money)
give (respectful equivalent of くれます)
be (polite equivalent of あります)

Kana: して いらっしゃいます
Meaning (EN): be doing (respectful equivalent of して います)

Kana: そのままに します
のどが かわきます
Meaning (EN): get thirsty (when expressing the condition of being thirsty, のどが かわきました is used)
put ～ together, put ～ in shape, sum up
give (to a younger person, subordinate, animals or plants)
